creator: aleks@twindb.com
text:
On 17.03.2012 1:20, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of databases/xtrabackup,
>
> Please note that PR ports/166189 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>

approved.

> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/166189
>
